name: Diffgram
description: Open-source AI data store for schemas, BLOBs and predictions with integrated human supervision, data workflows and UI catalog.

seo.title: Diffgram — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: Diffgram: Open-source AI data store for schemas, BLOBs and predictions with integrated human supervision, data workflows and UI catalog.

when_to_use: Labeling image, video, and text data for ML training pipelines
Managing annotation workflows with human review and QA
Versioning training datasets alongside model experiments
Running semi-automated labeling with model-assisted suggestions

pros: Open-source data store with human review
cons: Setup complexity higher than SaaS alternatives
review.verdict: The OSS choice when data sovereignty matters and Label Studio feels too annotation-only.
review.best_for: Regulated teams self-hosting the full ML data lifecycle
review.not_for: Small teams content with Label Studio or hosted annotation tools

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Freemium with no evidence of peak-lock
